'''[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Twolz''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Dannen Lifehold]]'s mentor. A decent man, he taught Dannen everything he knew. Twolz was killed when [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] raided his operation.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|1|Breaking Free: The Adventures of Dannen Lifehold}} {{1st}}
